data.description:
## What
Delete stale compiled artifacts of already-renamed tests + one cosmetic script var rename.

## Files
- tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/__pycache__/*dso*.pyc (test_dso_id_label_writers, test_outbound_differ_dso_id_exclusion, test_conflict_resolver_no_dso_id_writes)
- scripts/jira-pressure-test/e2e_field_validation_probe.sh (lines ~1298-1325: local dso_label -> rebar_label)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] stale *dso*.pyc removed (find . -name "*.pyc" -path "*dso*" -delete)
- [ ] dso_label renamed to rebar_label in the probe script
- [ ] no functional change
data.title: WU-4: clean stale dso build artifacts + rename script local var
